_comment: Team/user config. Copy to config.json and edit. NEVER put the auth cookie here — that goes in the TIMESHEET_COOKIE env var at runtime. Committing project/task ids and sheet layout is fine and safe.
_taskNote: name -> taskId, per project. Refresh with: GET /api/v2/task/list/{projectId}. A single default task is the common case (e.g. everything to Frontend - IGZ).
_sheetNote: Describe YOUR team's spreadsheet so parsing is unambiguous. These are hints for the model, not a rigid parser.

sheetLayout.description: One sheet per week named like '4th May - 8th May'. Header row has columns: Name, Task Details, Hours Spent (sometimes a Days serial column). Rows are grouped per person; the Name cell is merged/only on the first row of each block — carry it forward. Filter to the target person.
